body.title: Fix goal_adopt TWM category mismatch
body.result: Synced goal_adopt() TWM push and main.py BG context lookup from category='goal' to category='active_goal' — goals now properly discoverable by twm_get_active_goal() and downstream code. Tests passing.
body.description: goal_adopt pushes category='goal' but twm_get_active_goal() queries category='active_goal' — they never match. Fallback to GOAL memory works but is fragile. Fix: sync category names or rename consistently.
